title: Julie's Flank Steak
ingredients: ½ cup water, orange juice, or beef broth
instructions: Combine soy sauce, water (or orange juice or beef broth), Dijon mustard, dried rosemary, and brown sugar in a bowl and stir until brown sugar is dissolved.
Place flank steak in marinade and refrigerate for 2 hours.
Preheat grill to about 400 degrees F.
Grill for about 7 minutes per side to achieve medium rare doneness.
If desired, top flank steak with caramelized onions and sautéed mushrooms.
notes: If marinating more than 2 hours, change soy sauce to ½ cup soy sauce and 1 cup oil of choice.
This was made for many a Sunday dinner at our home!
